text: AMERICAN ACADEMY OF PEDIATRICS PARENTING EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on parenting, child development, health, learning, and safety and prevention. 345 Park Boulevard Itasca, IL 60143 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Internet Information Resources * Parenting Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
